rationale: The citing paper references Goswami and Urminsky (2016) only as part of a grouped literature summary (Table 1) on default effects in charitable giving. It is used to illustrate a general background point that defaults can raise participation while lowering per-person amounts, helping motivate the idea of unintended consequences. The citing paper does not separately engage this specific study's framework, mechanisms, methods, or findings in its own empirical design or interpretation.
